description: A new piece of equipment has failed within its warranty period. A maintenance manager must file a warranty claim with the vendor.

nodes.task_description: Find the asset record and verify its purchase date and warranty period.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the asset is still under its 1-year warranty.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the work order that details the failure.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls up the maintenance record showing the cause of failure.

nodes.task_description: Contact the equipment vendor, initiate a warranty claim, and provide the purchase and failure details.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully logs a warranty claim with the vendor and receives a claim number.
